user_query:
I want you to run a self-improvement review for our agent based on recent issues and patterns. Read all of these inputs first:
- input/incident_transcript.txt
- input/simplify_and_harden_candidates.json
- input/existing_learnings.md

Then produce these outputs under output/ (create folders if missing):
1) Append/update learning entries at output/.learnings/LEARNINGS.md using the prescribed structured format. Specifically:
   - From the transcript: log a learning for the "package manager mismatch" (we used npm but the repo requires pnpm). Use category best_practice or correction, include Pattern-Key "build.package_manager.pnpm", Source "conversation", increment Recurrence-Count if an existing entry with that Pattern-Key is found in input/existing_learnings.md, and set Status to "promoted".
   - Ingest every candidate from input/simplify_and_harden_candidates.json. For each:
     • If LEARNINGS.md already has an entry with the same Pattern-Key, increment Recurrence-Count and update Last-Seen. 
     • If not present, add a new LRN entry with Source "simplify-and-harden", Pattern-Key, Recurrence-Count: 1, and First-Seen/Last-Seen from the candidate. Status can remain "pending".
   - Ensure all learning entries follow the standard sections and metadata fields (ID, Logged, Priority, Status, Area, Summary, Details, Suggested Action, Metadata with Pattern-Key/Recurrence-Count).
2) Append an error entry to output/.learnings/ERRORS.md for the failing test command described in the transcript. Include the error snippet and a concrete Suggested Fix.
3) Append a feature request entry to output/.learnings/FEATURE_REQUESTS.md for the default "thread replies" behavior requested by the user. Include a clear Requested Capability, User Context, Complexity Estimate, and Suggested Implementation.
4) Promote broadly applicable guidance to persistent project memory:
   - Add a concise rule to output/CLAUDE.md under a "Build & Dependencies" section that makes the pnpm requirement unambiguous (e.g., a bullet that mentions using "pnpm install").
   - Add a brief actionable rule to output/AGENTS.md (or a suitable section you create) that states messages should thread replies by default, with one or two concrete bullets to operationalize it.

Notes:
- Use standardized IDs in the form TYPE-YYYYMMDD-XXX for all new entries.
- Keep entries concise but specific, with actionable Suggested Action sections.
- Update Recurrence-Count accurately when deduping by Pattern-Key.
- Do not use absolute paths; only use the relative paths above.
